title: bromus mollis subsp. hordeaceus
intro: Bromus mollis subsp. hordeaceus, also known as soft brome or meadow brome, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the genus Bromus, characterized by its soft, feathery leaves and delicate appearance. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The medicinal properties of Bromus mollis subsp. hordeaceus are said to reduce inflammation, promote relaxation, and support immune function, providing various health benefits for the body. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
